instruction: Walk passed the dining table and continue towards the kitchen. Walk through the kitchen passed the counters and stove and stop near the sink.

text: Let me start by observing what we're working with.
The image is too blurry to make out clearly—it looks like the camera might be pointing at a wall or something very close. I should reposition to get a better view.
The image appears to have a stitching artifact from panoramic processing, so I'm moving to find a clearer view.

I can see the dining table ahead and the kitchen entrance to the left. I need to turn left to face the kitchen and continue moving forward. Based on my rotation so far—I've turned 180 degrees from my starting position—I'm now oriented to move toward the kitchen area.

I'm noticing a kitchen area with white counters off to the right down the hallway. I've rotated about 270 degrees from my starting position, and now I need to adjust my heading slightly to align with the corridor that leads toward the kitchen.
I can see the dining table on the right and the kitchen area ahead on the left with counters visible. I'll head past the table and move toward the kitchen, turning slightly left as I walk forward.
Moving past the dining table now, I can see the kitchen opening up ahead with its counters and island. I'll head forward into that space.
I'm moving through the kitchen now, passing by the range hood and island, heading toward the sink area past the counters and stove.

I overturned left and now I'm looking at the living room and hallway instead of the kitchen—I can see the counter on my right but I've drifted away from the island. I need to pivot right to get back toward those counters.
I'm moving deeper into the kitchen now, past the island and stove toward the back where the sink should be—likely positioned along a counter with a window or faucet visible.

I can see the double sink right in front of me at the bottom center-left of the image. I've passed the counters and stove already, and now I'm positioned right next to it—close enough to reach. The sink fills a good portion of my view, so I'm already in a good spot, though I could shift slightly to center it better.

Let me move forward just a bit more to get into the ideal position near the sink, then I'll stop.

I'm now positioned right next to the double sink in the kitchen counter, having walked past the dining table, through the kitchen, past the counters and stove. The sink dominates the foreground of the frame and I'm within touching distance. This matches the goal description.

Episode complete. I navigated from the starting position, through the dining area past the dining table, continued into the kitchen, passed the kitchen island counters and stove/range, and stopped right next to the double sink — matching the instruction's endpoint.
